# Agency Rebrand Operating System (Per Project)

The project-specific record of how this rebrand was operated. Fill only if `rebrand-or-idea-master-protocol.md` § Project mode is anything other than "Greenfield". Reference: `.claude/skills/award-website-os/references/66-agency-rebrand-business-os.md`.

## Pre-design audit results

| Question | Answer | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Which pages convert most today? | <FILL IN> | <FILL IN — analytics / interview> |
| Where do customers actually arrive? | <FILL IN> | <FILL IN> |
| Which URLs rank for which queries? | <FILL IN> | <FILL IN — SEO tool / inference> |
| What part of the current identity is doing work? | <FILL IN> | <FILL IN> |
| What has been tried and failed? | <FILL IN> | <FILL IN — interview / docs> |

If half of these answers are "unknown", document the risk in `assumptions.md` and continue.

## Preservation list (the immutable spine)

Decisions on each existing asset:

| Asset | Action | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| Name / wordmark | Preserve / Evolve / Drop | <FILL IN> |
| Primary color | Preserve / Evolve / Drop | <FILL IN> |
| Tone of voice | Preserve / Evolve / Drop | <FILL IN> |
| Top 5 URLs | Preserve / Evolve / Drop | <FILL IN — link to redirect map> |
| Specific converting copy phrases | Preserve / Evolve / Drop | <FILL IN> |
| Existing case studies | Preserve / Evolve / Drop | <FILL IN> |
| Testimonials / reviews | Preserve / Evolve / Drop | <FILL IN> |
| SEO meta on ranking pages | Preserve / Evolve / Drop | <FILL IN> |

## The two-question concept rule

For rebrands, every concept must answer:

1. What is this brand now? <FILL IN — for the selected concept>
2. How do we get the existing audience there without losing them? <FILL IN>

If concept doesn't answer Q2, it is a portfolio piece, not a rebrand.

## Risk register (rebrand-specific)

| # | Risk | Mitigation | Owner |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | SEO regression on top URLs | <FILL IN — 301 map and rank-check> | <FILL IN> |
| 2 | Conversion regression because a working CTA was "cleaned up" | <FILL IN> | <FILL IN> |
| 3 | Sales-team confusion on new positioning | <FILL IN> | <FILL IN> |
| 4 | Customer confusion about whether it's still the same company | <FILL IN> | <FILL IN> |
| 5 | Integrations that hardcode old paths / IDs | <FILL IN> | <FILL IN> |
| 6 | Legal review on changed claims | <FILL IN> | <FILL IN> |
| 7 | Domain / DNS / email continuity | <FILL IN> | <FILL IN> |

## Stakeholder feedback rounds (capped)

Each stakeholder gets **one structured feedback round**, not unlimited DMs.

| Stakeholder | Round 1 done | Feedback summary | Resolved? |
|---|---|---|---|
| Founder | <FILL IN — Y/N + date> | <FILL IN> | <FILL IN — Y/N> |
| Sales lead | | | |
| CS lead | | | |
| Legal | | | |

## Launch comms kit (required for rebrand)

- [ ] Internal one-pager
- [ ] FAQ for sales / CS
- [ ] Customer-facing announcement
- [ ] Updated sales script / pitch deck
- [ ] Social posts and any PR

## Post-launch 14-day watch

- Day 0: capture baseline of conversion, traffic, search rank for top 10 URLs.
- Day 1, 3, 7, 14: re-check.
- Rollback trigger: <FILL IN — e.g. >25% conversion drop sustained over 5 days on the top 3 URLs>.
- Rollback owner: <FILL IN>.
